name: VisionBoard (Python 3.12 + uv)
postCreateCommand: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && echo 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc && $HOME/.local/bin/uv sync
postStartCommand: setsid bash -lc 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && exec uv run uvicorn backend.app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000' > /tmp/vision-board.log 2>&1 < /dev/null &
